items.failure_pattern: Partial abstention (some sub-questions answerable, others not) surfaces only in warnings[]; no first-class JSON field distinguishes partial abstention from full abstention or full answer. Readers must hunt in warnings to know which sub-questions were refused.
items.successful_strategy: RESOLVED in v0.2.0: added top-level partial_abstentions[] field with structured entries {claim_or_question_part, status, reason, missing_evidence, suggested_next_document, confidence}. abstention_flag now binary for full-answer refusal only. Text output adds '⚠ Phần không đủ bằng chứng' section. Additive field → backward compatible.
items.instruction_patch: APPLIED in v0.2.0: SKILL.md output schema + abstention decision tree (full vs partial); policies.md §3 abstention policy extended with 3 modes (full abstain / partial abstain / low-confidence answer) + Vietnamese text UX rule.
items.status_note: resolved_in_v0.2.0 — partial_abstention_accuracy=1.00, abstention_visibility=top_level across 4 group-A fixtures.

items.failure_pattern: ExtractTable module was not wired: pdfplumber detected tables and extract.py emitted table_id, but no structured cell extraction flowed into the answer. table_handling reached 0.85 in v0.1.1 (citation format fixed) but remained BELOW the 0.90 DoD threshold because table_cell_accuracy was N/A (no cells extracted).
items.successful_strategy: RESOLVED in v0.2.0: extract.py now emits global table_id (pN.ti) + chart_id (pN.ci), infers units + period from headers via regex, computes parse_confidence per table, sets table_uncertainty_disclosure=true when <0.7. Citation code-path enforces table/chart format when source is a visual. Cells flow into answer; table_cell_accuracy now measurable.
items.instruction_patch: APPLIED in v0.2.0: extract.py rewritten (global ids, units/period inference, parse_confidence, uncertainty disclosure, chart detection); policies.md §1 citation trigger note 'enforced by code path'; parsers.md extract output spec updated to v0.2.0 schema.
items.status_note: resolved_in_v0.2.0 — table_handling=1.00, table_cell_accuracy=1.00 on 3 table fixtures; pdfplumber only (no heavy dep added).

items.failure_pattern: Forecast numbers from different horizons (decade target, multi-year model, short-term probability range) presented without declaring type {actual|forecast|target|probability_range|scenario} + time horizon, risking reader conflation.
items.successful_strategy: Add to financial policy: each forecast number must declare type + time horizon; when >=2 horizons in one answer, label inline or summarize in horizon-type table. Add self-check items for forecast disclosure.
items.instruction_patch: Old: 'PHAN BIET du lieu thuc te / du bao / nhan dinh' -> New: add 'Muc tieu (target)', 'Khoang xac suat (probability_range)' types + 'MOI so du bao phai khai bao (a) loai, (b) time horizon' + inline label rule when >=2 horizons. Self-check: +2 items.

items.failure_pattern: Citations for chart/table-page claims use text-citation format [file, page, section, quote] instead of table/chart format; table_id from extract.py never propagated into citation.
items.successful_strategy: Add trigger rule to citation policy: 'When cited page has parser-detected table/chart AND claim references a number/range from that visual -> use table format [file, page, table_id/chart_id, ...]'. Add to parsers.md: 'extract.py MUST propagate table_id into citation candidate'.
items.instruction_patch: Old: 'Với bảng: [file, page, table_id, row/col]' (format only, no trigger) -> New: add 'Khi nào dùng format bảng (trigger)' block + parsers.md 'Bắt buộc truyền table_id' rule + SKILL.md workflow step 4 '+table_id'.

items.failure_pattern: Citations omitted page number when parser returned text without per-page metadata.
items.successful_strategy: extract.py MUST return {text, page} per page; AnswerWithCitation verifies page ∈ evidence set before emitting any citation.
items.instruction_patch: Old: 'emit citation with file and quote' → New: 'emit citation [file, page, section, quote]; if page missing → note + abstain'.

items.failure_pattern: Skill fabricated an answer when evidence was insufficient (hallucination instead of abstention).
items.successful_strategy: Run DetectMissingEvidence mandatorily before AnswerWithCitation. Default pdf_only=true. If missing → abstention_flag=true.
items.instruction_patch: Old: 'answer if you can' → New: 'always run DetectMissingEvidence first; if missing → abstention_flag=true'.

items.failure_pattern: Table extraction dropped units and period columns, leading to ambiguous numbers.
items.successful_strategy: ExtractTable MUST emit {headers, rows, units, period}. If any missing → warning + lower confidence; never cite the table as certain.
items.instruction_patch: Old: 'extract table rows' → New: 'emit headers+units+period; if any missing → warning + lower confidence'.
